name: Welcome Email
subject: Welcome to Ridgeline, {{first_name}}!
html_content:
Welcome {{first_name}}

Thanks for signing up for Ridgeline. Save links, read later, stay organized.

name: Password Reset
subject: Reset your Ridgeline password
html_content: Click here to reset your password. This link expires in 30 minutes.

name: Payment Receipt
subject: Your Ridgeline receipt for {{invoice_id}}
html_content:
Payment received

Thanks {{first_name}}, we charged {{amount}} to your card on file. Invoice {{invoice_id}}.

name: Subscription Confirmation
subject: Your Ridgeline Pro subscription is active
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your {{plan}} subscription is now active. Next renewal: {{renewal_date}}.

name: Weekly Digest
subject: Your Ridgeline weekly digest
html_content:
This week's saved links

{{first_name}}, you saved {{saved_count}} links. {{unread_count}} still unread.

name: Account Deleted
subject: Your Ridgeline account has been deleted
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your account and saved data have been permanently removed. Sorry to see you go.

name: Email Verification
subject: Confirm your Ridgeline email address
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, please confirm your email by clicking this link. It expires in 24 hours.

name: Trial Expiring Soon
subject: Your Ridgeline trial ends in {{days_left}} days
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your free trial ends on {{trial_end}}. Upgrade to Pro to keep your saved links syncing.

name: Payment Failed
subject: We couldn't process your Ridgeline payment
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your {{plan}} renewal failed. Please update your card to avoid losing access.

name: Magic Link Login
subject: Your Ridgeline login link
html_content: Click here to sign in to Ridgeline. This link works once and expires in 15 minutes.

name: Shared Collection Invite
subject: {{sender_name}} shared a Ridgeline collection with you
html_content: {{sender_name}} invited you to view the collection "{{collection_name}}". Open it here.

name: Import Complete
subject: Your bookmark import finished
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, we imported {{imported_count}} links from {{source}}. {{failed_count}} could not be imported.

name: Glanceboard Waitlist Welcome
subject: You're on the Glanceboard waitlist
html_content:
Thanks for joining

Hi {{first_name}}, you're #{{position}} on the Glanceboard waitlist. We'll email you when your invite is ready.

name: Glanceboard Early Access Invite
subject: Your Glanceboard invite is ready
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your early access invite is live. Set up your first board to get started.

name: Monthly Usage Summary
subject: Your Ridgeline month in review
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, this month you saved {{saved_count}} links and read {{read_count}}. Your top tag was {{top_tag}}.

name: Referral Reward Earned
subject: You earned a free month of Ridgeline Pro
html_content: Nice work {{first_name}}! {{referee_name}} signed up with your link, so you've earned one free month of Pro.

name: Re-engagement
subject: We miss you at Ridgeline, {{first_name}}
html_content: It's been a while. You still have {{unread_count}} unread links waiting. Pick up where you left off.

name: Subscription Canceled
subject: Your Ridgeline Pro subscription was canceled
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, your subscription is canceled and will not renew. You'll keep Pro features until {{access_end}}.

name: Ridgeline Product Update
subject: What's new in Ridgeline this month
html_content:
New this month

Hi {{first_name}}, we shipped {{feature_name}} and a bunch of fixes. Read the changelog.

name: Data Export Ready
subject: Your Ridgeline data export is ready to download
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, the export you requested is ready. Download it here. The link expires in 7 days.
